title: Fix location link and allow photo replacement in Services page

requirements.summary: Update the Google Maps location link in the Footer component to point to the correct office address
acceptanceCriteria: The Google Maps link in the footer navigates to the correct business location
The link opens in a new tab
The displayed address text matches the actual location

file_operations.description: Update the Google Maps location link to point to Vijay Sawkar's correct office address. Ensure the link opens in a new tab with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'. Update the displayed address text to match the actual business location. The link currently uses a placeholder Maps URL that needs to be replaced with the correct coordinates or address for the practice location.

requirements.summary: Replace placeholder photo boxes with actual certificate images in the Vastu Advance Course section
acceptanceCriteria: The Vastu Advance Course section in Services.tsx shows actual img elements instead of empty div placeholders
Each img element has a descriptive alt attribute
If images are not available, the img src attributes are clearly marked so the user can supply the correct file paths
The layout and styling of the image containers is preserved

file_operations.description: In the Vastu Advance Course section, replace the placeholder photo boxes (currently rendered as empty div elements) with actual img elements. Use the generated certificate images available at frontend/public/assets/generated/vastu-advance-cert-1.dim_1080x763.jpg and frontend/public/assets/generated/vastu-advance-cert-2.dim_1080x763.jpg. Each img element should have descriptive alt text like 'Vastu Advance Course Certificate 1' and 'Vastu Advance Course Certificate 2'. Preserve the existing layout structure and cosmic dark theme styling for the image containers. Ensure the images are properly sized and displayed within the course section.
